# familio_person (Resource)

A person in a familio.org family tree. NOTE: creating/updating/deleting is not yet supported (the Familio write API is still being reverse-engineered); only Read and import work today.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `birth_settlement` (String) Birth settlement UUID.
- `father_uuid` (String) UUID of the father person.
- `first_name` (String) Given name (имя).
- `gender` (String) Gender. One of: male, female.
- `last_name` (String) Surname (фамилия).
- `mother_uuid` (String) UUID of the mother person.
- `patronymic` (String) Patronymic (отчество).
- `uuid` (String) The familio.org person UUID.

### Read-Only

- `birth_date` (String) Birth date as returned by familio.org.
- `catalog_key` (String) Source catalog slug (null for user-created persons).
- `catalog_name` (String) Source catalog name.
- `death_date` (String) Death date as returned by familio.org.
- `display_name` (String) Full display name.
- `has_death_event` (Boolean) Whether a death event is recorded.
- `short_display_name` (String) Abbreviated display name.
- `type` (String) Familio person type.
- `updated_at` (String) Last update timestamp.
